name: Dole Raisin Pineapple Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the sugar and margarine together until light and fluffy.
2. Add in the egg, pineapple juice, and orange peel. Mix well.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients separately.
4. Stir the combined dry ingredients into the juice mixture until just moistened.
5. Spoon the batter into six muffin cups that have been coated with cooking spray.
6. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.
7. Cool on a rack before serving warm.
